# Research Bookmark Curator (Uplizd) - Intelligent link organization and automated knowledge retrieval

## Summary
The Research Bookmark Curator is an automated Uplizd AI workflow designed to streamline information management by automatically categorizing, tagging, and indexing research links. By leveraging the Composio Toolset to interface with bookmarking platforms and knowledge bases, this solution eliminates manual data entry, ensures a single source of truth for research assets, and significantly improves pipeline velocity for teams managing high volumes of digital resources.

---
